stocks.impact_theory: Intel reported Q1 2026 earnings beating estimates with $13.6B revenue (vs $12.4B exp) and adj EPS $0.29 (vs $0.01 exp), driven by AI data center growth up 22% YoY. Economic implications include boosted US semiconductor self-reliance amid CHIPS Act and gov stake gains ($28B unrealized). Market psychology: Short squeeze and FOMO as legacy chipmaker revives, historical parallel to NVDA's 2023 AI rally (+200% post-earnings). Analogies: 1) Caterpillar post-2009 recovery on infrastructure boom; 2) Ford EV pivot hype in 2021.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings blowout and AI guidance sparked +24% surge; X sentiment highly positive (gov stake +315% gain hyped); web news confirms Wall St buys, Cramer bullish. Continued AI demand supports further upside into next week.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 10-15% gains on AI momentum, target $40
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short above $38 if foundry delays emerge, potential 5-10% pullback
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Overbought RSI, competition from NVDA/AMD, geopolitical Taiwan tensions.

stocks.justification: Strong earnings data, gov backing, high X engagement confirm sentiment shift.

stocks.impact_theory: Rumors of $13B buyout bid by Sun Pharma drove +30% surge. Economic: M&A wave in pharma amid patent cliffs; psych: Speculative frenzy on undervalued dividend play. Historical: Similar to Alexion's $39B AstraZeneca deal (stock +50%). Analogies: 1) Activision pre-MSFT acquisition pump; 2) Twitter hype before Musk buyout.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Buyout speculation dominant in news; X mentions in oversold lists but positive volume; premarket +30% confirms shift if deal materializes.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Deal failure, regulatory hurdles, high yield trap.

stocks.justification: Rumor-driven but strong volume; needs confirmation.

stocks.impact_theory: Phase 3 trial for LPCN 1154 (postpartum depression) failed primary endpoint, crashing -78%. Econ: Biotech funding drought hits microcaps; psych: Total capitulation. Historical: Like Cassava Sciences 2022 trial flop (-60%). Analogies: 1) Balloon deflating at party; 2) House of cards in wind.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Trial failure news universal; no X buzz, pure selloff; further dilution risk.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Avoid or bottom fish at $0.30 for 50% rebound
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Short squeeze in pennystock, pivot to new trials.

stocks.justification: Clear catalyst failure, massive volume confirms shift.

stocks.impact_theory: Nasdaq delisting to OTC after bid price failure, -73%. Econ: Liquidity crunch for microcaps; psych: Death spiral fear. Historical: Many delistings like BBIG 2023. Analogies: 1) Evicted from luxury apt to street; 2) Bounced check cascade.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Delisting confirmed, OTC transition; low X sentiment; compliance issues persist.

stocks.impact_theory: Enterprise software pressure from AI disruption, Dow loser amid tech rotation. Econ: Budget cuts in CRM spend; psych: Valuation reset. Historical: Like ADBE post-2022 slowdown. Analogies: 1) iPhone peak before Android rise; 2) Oil majors in EV shift.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Analyst cuts PT to $215; X neutral; broader tech caution amid Iran news.

stocks.justification: Mixed news, but sector rotation evident.
